problem: Desktop Studio controls worked, but Android mobile and Meta Quest VR controls were not responsive enough.

src/MainCellExperience/BuildMainCellExpe: Added activeGamepads() to read Roblox navigation gamepads and all connected gamepads instead of only Enum.UserInputType.Gamepad1.
Added Humanoid.MoveDirection as an input source so Roblox default mobile thumbstick and VR/player controls feed the swim controller.
Reduced gamepad thumbstick deadzone from 0.16/0.18 to 0.08.
Added TOUCH_INPUT_GAIN = 1.45 and GAMEPAD_INPUT_GAIN = 1.35 for partial stick/thumb movement.
Increased swim input smoothing response from 8.5/3.1 to 10.5/4.0.
src/CellExperience/Gameplay/PlayerBootst: Applied the same Android/VR input fixes to the shared cytoplasm swimming bootstrap.

remaining_required_device_review: Android: confirm left thumb input starts movement immediately at small deflection.
Android: confirm right-side screen drag still steers the camera while left pad swims.
Quest: confirm left controller stick swims forward/back/strafe.
Quest: confirm A/R1 rises and B/L1 sinks, or map alternate Quest buttons if those are not emitted by the headset.
